urdu transliteration text: Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
english translation text:
From the killing fields arose the cry,
No one remains; there is a lull all around,
Who has been looted in this foreign land?
No one remains; there is a lull all around

urdu transliteration text:
Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
Every corpse headless lies!
english translation text:
God! What a scene before our eyes!
Flows here a river of blood,
No one remains; there is a lull all around

urdu transliteration text:
Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
The enveloping air is sorrowful today,
Grieving clouds have covered the heavens,
english translation text: There is no one to tend to the corpses,

urdu transliteration text:
Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
And dried, broken little mugs too,
english translation text:
Some tents can be seen in the distance - all incinerated,
Was this a caravan of thirsty people?

urdu transliteration text: Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
english translation text:
Who is this prince whose corpse here lies?
O! How was his chest wounded?
Which mother has Fate afflicted with this grief?

urdu transliteration text: Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
english translation text:
There are two corpses of identical length,
Drenched in a sea of blood,
Both have been looted by death

urdu transliteration text:
Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
His persona still caries such a charm,
english translation text:
There is a lion who lies at the river bank,
That the breeze blows gently (by his corpse),

urdu transliteration text:
Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
And nearby lies a cradle too,
english translation text:
Here lies a little grave,
Who killed this sinless child?

urdu transliteration text:
Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
Sorrow blankets all directions,
Without shroud or coffin lies his corpse,
english translation text: O! Who has fallen asleep upon the arrows?

urdu transliteration text: Maqtal se Yehi Aati thi Sada
english translation text:
O Munawwar! how stunned was the person (i.e. Munawwar),
(When he heard) some Lady's voice,“My family has been destroyed”
